description: Labelling schema for the reg-OCR photo benchmark (TIER B). The committed manifest carries NO ground-truth registrations (PII). Ground-truth VRM labels live in a gitignored overlay keyed by item id (see overlayKey + harness/README.md). Mirrors scripts/eval-email/manifest.json + its eval-overlay split.

axes.crop: OCR accuracy on a clean, pre-cropped plate region
axes.full-photo: end-to-end accuracy on a full vehicle photo (detector must find the plate)
axes.visibility: visibility detection independent of a confident read (visible/unreadable/absent)

labelFields.ground_truth_vrm: the true registration, NORMALISED (uppercase, alnum only). PII -> overlay only.
labelFields.plate_visible: one of: visible_readable | visible_unreadable | not_visible  (the tri-state the boolean layer cannot express)
labelFields.person_reflection: bool: a person/photographer reflection present (ADR exclusion)
labelFields.expected_role: overview | damage_closeup | additional | other (for the same-vehicle / role axis)

itemSchema.file: repo-relative path to the image (a committed sample, or an operator-local path)
itemSchema.tracked: bool: false = may be locally absent (skip gracefully)
itemSchema.overlayKey: key into the gitignored ground-truth overlay (never the VRM itself)
itemSchema.shape_note: PII-safe description of the plate's visibility/shape (NOT the registration)

items.shape_note: real CE evidence photo: white hatchback front-end damage close-up; a current-style UK plate is present at the bottom edge but PARTIALLY CROPPED by the frame -> a 'visible_unreadable-ish' / hard end-to-end case.
real CE evidence photo, same vehicle, damage close-up; verify plate presence/legibility when labelling.
real CE evidence photo, same vehicle, damage close-up.
real CE evidence photo, same vehicle, damage close-up.

corpusGaps: No committed labelled OVERVIEW (whole-vehicle, plate-legible) photos exist in-repo; the 4 TKT-040 items are damage close-ups, not the overview shot the EVA image-rule needs.

A representative TIER B run needs ~30-50 labelled real overview photos spanning: clean plate / partial / angled / low-light / new-style 2021+ green-flash / private plates / no-plate-visible / person-reflection / another-vehicle-in-frame.

Those live in the evidence blob (cespkevidstdev01) + Box and are customer PII -> must be pulled + labelled under the G5 'AI testing on repo data' allowance with the ground-truth VRMs kept in the gitignored overlay, not committed.
